issues.objection: 7.23 ships a concrete diagnostic an engineer could actually use. The concrete_scenario names specific tooling and a real role-shape; the falsifiability field forecloses the specific misreading hostile readers would supply. Quotable line: "Surface-mastery has the duration of the surface; substrate-mastery has the duration of distributed systems.…" Counter-example carves out where the analog does NOT apply. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Hostile-engineer test for 7.23: would a senior reading this verse mock it as Sanskrit-flavoured productivity content? No. The verse names a discipline (or pathology) with operational specificity. PASS.
